data.title: Foton Motor's Overseas Brand Day and 30th Anniversary Celebration Successfully Held in Beijing
data.description: FOTON Motor celebrated its inaugural FOTON BRAND DAY in Beijing on April 22, 2026. The event drew media and dealer representatives from Europe, the Americas, and Southeast Asia. Attendees enjoyed factory tours, product test drives, and commemorated the company's 30th anniversary.

data.title: $1.4B at risk as Bitcoin shorts face liquidation at $80K. Price squeeze to $80K looming, triggered by spot market demand?
data.description: Bitcoin attempted to surpass the $79,000 threshold but fell short. The situation may have created a bear trap as approximately $1.4 billion worth of short positions are on the line for liquidation once the price hits $80,000. The question remains whether the demand in the spot market will serve as the catalyst for this potential event.

data.title: GRUPO ELEKTRA ANNOUNCES REVENUE OF PS.49,803 MILLION AND EBITDA OF PS.6,619 MILLION IN THE FIRST QUARTER OF 2026
data.description: In Mexico City on April 27, 2026, Grupo Elektra, S.A.B. de C.V. (BMV: ELEKTRA* Latibex: XEKT) revealed its status as Latin America's premier specialty retailer and financial services firm. Additionally, it is the top non-bank supplier of cash advance facilities in the United States. This announcement followed the release of their first-quarter results, showcasing their strong performance within the industry.
